title: Maxing Your 401k Too Fast Costs You $4,300
hook: You hit your 401k max in October — and your employer legally stopped matching for the rest of the year. Nobody told you this.
angle: Diligent savers who front-load contributions lose the employer match for every remaining pay period if their plan lacks a true-up provision — 43% of plans don't have one.
audience: Motivated savers with access to a 401k who try to max contributions early in the year
